text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
78 
LINE_LAST_EXPNS_DT 
LABEL: 
Line Last Expense Date 
DESCRIPTION: The ending date (last expense) for the line-item service on the non-institutional encounter record. 
It is almost always the same as the line-level first expense date (variable called LINE_1ST_EXPNS_DT); 
exception is for DME claims — where some services are billed in advance. 
SHORT NAME: LINE_LAST_EXPNS_DT 
LONG
